prestazioni: Engine swap to a **3.0L 24V C30XEI** (Code: C30XEI) with forged internals including **Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (8.5:1 CR)**, **Manley H-beam connecting rods**, and a **billet crankshaft from JE Pistons** for 8000 RPM reliability. Pair with a **Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger** (0.82 A/R turbine housing) and a **custom 42mm wastegate** from Turbosmart for 1.2 bar boost, targeting 450 HP at the crank.

Full **custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system** by **Supersprint** with a **200-cell catalytic converter** and **scavenged merge collectors** for optimal turbo spool. Upgrade to a **Bosch Motorsport 044 high-flow fuel pump** and **Siemens DEKA 80lb/h injectors**, controlled by a **Link G4+ Xtreme standalone ECU** with **individual cylinder tuning** and **launch control** for drag strip use.

Suspension overhaul with **Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers** (Monza-specific valving) and **polyurethane bushings from Powerflex (Black Series)** for the **Opel-specific rear multi-link setup**. Add a **Whiteline front sway bar (24mm adjustable)** and **rear sway bar (22mm)** to eliminate body roll, paired with **Brembo GT 6-piston front calipers** and **355mm two-piece rotors** for track-ready stopping power.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit** (Monza-specific, bolt-on fenders with 50mm flares) paired with a **custom carbon fiber front splitter** by **Seibon** and a **rear diffuser from APR Performance** (designed for the Monza’s Kammback tail).

**OEM+ restomod interior** with **Recaro SRD Evo seats** (Opel-specific mounting brackets) wrapped in **Nappa leather from Bridge of Weir**, a **Momo Prototipo steering wheel** (380mm, suede), and a **custom roll cage** by **Custom Cages UK** (bolt-in, FIA-spec with door bars).

**Aggressive stance** achieved with **BBS LM-R wheels (9x18 ET15 front, 10.5x18 ET20 rear)** in **Gunmetal finish**, wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/40/18 front, 275/35/18 rear)**. Lowered 40mm via **Ohlins DFV coilovers** with **custom camber plates** for -3.5° front and -2.8° rear alignment.
